name: @radzor/slack-bot
description: Slack bot for sending messages, Block Kit layouts, file uploads, and slash command responses via the Slack Web API. Supports both Bot tokens and incoming webhooks.

inputs.name: botToken
inputs.description: Slack Bot OAuth token (xoxb-...). Required for API methods.

inputs.name: webhookUrl
inputs.description: Slack Incoming Webhook URL for simple message delivery.

inputs.name: signingSecret
inputs.description: Slack app signing secret for verifying incoming event payloads.

outputs.name: messageResult
outputs.type: { ts: string; channel: string; ok: boolean }
outputs.description: Sent message timestamp and channel ID.

events.name: onMessageSent
events.description: Fired when a message is successfully sent.

actions.name: sendMessage

params.name: options
params.description: Optional thread_ts for replies, and link unfurl settings.

actions.description: Send a text message to a channel or user.

actions.name: sendBlocks
actions.description: Send a rich Block Kit message.

params.name: channel
params.description: Channel ID of the original message.

params.name: threadTs
params.description: Timestamp of the parent message to reply to.

actions.name: uploadFile

params.name: channel
params.description: Channel to share the file in.

actions.description: Upload a file and share it in a channel.

actions.name: verifyRequest
actions.description: Verify the HMAC signature of an incoming Slack event or slash command.

llm.constraints: Requires botToken for API methods (sendMessage, sendBlocks, uploadFile). webhookUrl can replace botToken for simple notifications only. Always verify incoming requests with verifyRequest() using signingSecret.
